76195.subject: Revolut just gave AI Agents keys to its trading platform 🤖💸; Stripe & Advent bid $53B for PayPal, but Advent’s p…
76195.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/weeklyfintechpulse408

👋 Hey, Linas here! Welcome back to a 🔓 weekly free edition 🔓 of my daily newsletter. Each day, I focus on 3 stories that are making a difference in the financial technology space. Coupled with things worth watching & most important money movements, it’s the only newsletter you need for all things when Finance meets Tech.
Join the Future of Finance & AI:
If you’re not a subscriber, here’s what you missed this week:
How to Build a Second Brain with Claude Fable 5 [ https://substack.com/redirect/b3260964-a63e-4b84-b3fe-ae602acb4094?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 🧠 [ https://substack.com/redirect/b3260964-a63e-4b84-b3fe-ae602acb4094?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [The step-by-step playbook for building a Claude Fable 5 second brain: persistent AI memory with Obsidian and plain markdown, every prompt included]
The Most Practical Guide to Claude Fable 5 [ https://substack.com/redirect/6807f361-a527-4746-926d-f429f05f2c9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 📚 [ https://substack.com/redirect/6807f361-a527-4746-926d-f429f05f2c9a?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [How to win with the most capable AI model Anthropic has ever released to the public, while you still have about 24 hours left]
How to Build an Agentic OS with Claude Fable 5 [ https://substack.com/redirect/ce8a70ef-8597-490e-b354-fef405f4eb6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 🤖 [ https://substack.com/redirect/ce8a70ef-8597-490e-b354-fef405f4eb6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [The complete guide to building an autonomous AI agent operating system with Claude Fable 5 — architecture, working code, cost control, security, and the economics of agentic labor]
Attention Is the New Startup Infrastructure: The Founder’s Playbook for Winning in the AI Age [ https://substack.com/redirect/a6669eb8-56be-43bd-9004-89861fd7583c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 📚 [ https://substack.com/redirect/a6669eb8-56be-43bd-9004-89861fd7583c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [Inside a16z’s “go-direct as a service” model — and the exact moves founders need to turn attention into customers, hires, and capital]
Apple’s OpenAI trade secret lawsuit is a hardware play, not a legal one [ https://substack.com/redirect/2f0b1748-87a8-4e2a-a878-4a82f3cf3106?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] 😳📱 [ https://substack.com/redirect/2f0b1748-87a8-4e2a-a878-4a82f3cf3106?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] [what the lawsuit is all about and why it’s actually a hardware play, not a legal one at the core + bonus dives into OpenAI’s IPO plans [ https://substack.com/redirect/ced54f27-ef8c-4e2c-a77b-79998d5b6c37?j=eyJ1I

76194.subject: The Iran war is America’s least popular since polls began
76194.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5NDJ9AAcAAAAABDRymYoouiu0j6z2yEomEalelw55EH-tpI9GTi5cBSmcuZggl9nuZmI7jjfrzbSacCal_pLx6DF7B2k5bJE3R0XTC0gpTPScdMfxs1o8cCriKw 

July 19th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 A Sunday edition of our daily newsletter


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5NDJ9AAcAAAAABDRymYopsg5DAIGHb8e0ktH0PRylmEhJBGod-4ZtsGhaSS4RABOsQoso1FrFpvLP6ecf13lqJZUL_zHH81JAyRInbX2Yi6HpfMbypnYzG7_rmw 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5NDJ9AAcAAAAABDRymYoqmL_lGiXcPBh6HXJjbbUeIUxZVrdaa159Cl93ipMppSMMBhaD0_iceTCNnVtBfY9lyaGu9JeaUPSSt9DbU7lBeJcK2uAt-HGOLgpElQ 


 


 
 

Stephanie Studer

Senior digital editor



The war in Vietnam took six years to become as hated by Americans as the Iran war has 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5NDJ9AAcAAAAABDRymYor5joRGRsHQwXqQVHzHOJmWMXXA3ND9MEpngp64TQ4NH33AR_XJu2T8LlZunXpSP33JNgWBdH1kkNaXKH611912vc_HYoqLhNB 
become in six months . Net approval for Donald Trump’s war among Democratic voters is a solidly abject -84%. But here’s a surprise: for the first time, many more than half of his supporters approve only “somewhat” of how he’s handling his job, according to a Washington Post/Ipsos poll.


Elsewhere: China’s young billionaires have made their wealth from video games, tea, AI and Labubus. This generation of tycoons is China’s most glob

76192.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest - July 19
76192.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-19-oleh-bezuhlyi-nmfdf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BeiAxlS2TS5WEmzgoBrPVtA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=04Rx5LuU3ZQck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrs0gqmj~sn-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrs0gqmj-sn
  
🧠 AI’s Crypto News Brief: Prediction markets have exploded with $50 billion in volume as Kraken secures a historic FIFA partnership. However, regulatory friction in Europe and shifting Treasury correlations present ongoing challenges for market stability. 🏆World Cup final drives $50 billion in prediction market volume as crypto platforms eclipse traditional sportsbooks The Spain vs. Argentina final has propelled crypto-based prediction markets to record heights, surpassing $50 billion in volume. Platforms like Polymarket are now outperforming traditional sportsbooks, showcasing the massive scale of decentralized betting. Read full story 🛑Bitcoin's biggest advocate, Michael Saylor, says new plan to clean up the blockchain is 'a bad idea' Michael Saylor has come out against BIP-110, a proposal designed to block "spam" data from the Bitcoin blockchain. Saylor argues that such measures threaten the network’s neutrality and set a dangerous precedent for censorship. See details ⚽World Cup final brings crypto spotlight to New York as Kraken makes history with FIFA deal Kraken has become the first crypto exchange to sponsor a FIFA World Cup, marking a milestone for mainstream adoption. The partnership culminates as global fans descend on MetLife Stadium for the final match between Argentina and Spain. Read full story 🇪🇺Brussels faces resistance as countries demand sanctions carve-outs, threatening EU crypto crackdown on Russia EU member states are demanding exceptions to aggressive crypto sanctions targeting Russia, creating a rift in the bloc's regulatory strategy. This resistance threatens to stall Brussels' most significant attempt to control digital asset flows related to the conflict. See details 💰Kraken launches USD-settled Bitcoin and Ethereum options with no crypto collateral required Kraken is expanding its institutional suite with cash-settled Bitcoin and Ethereum options that do not require crypto collateral. This move specifically targets traditional traders looking for easier entry points into digital asset derivatives. Read full story 📉Treasuries are amplifying market selloffs and Bitcoin is paying the price The historical "insurance" relationship where Treasuries rally during equity drops is breaking down. This shift is intensifying market selloffs and putting downward pressure on Bitcoin as traditional hedging strateg
